beckn:descriptor.beckn:longDesc: Perform duties as Accountant with inclusive workplace support
beckn:descriptor.schema:name: Accountant - Hearing Disability #6

beckn:form.beckn:data:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xf:model xmlns:xf="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
  <xf:instance id="form-data">
    <data xmlns="">
      <job_title></job_title>
      <full_name></full_name>
      <email></email>
      <phone></phone>
      <current_location></current_location>
      <total_experience></total_experience>
      <current_role_summary></current_role_summary>
      <primary_skills></primary_skills>
      <notice_period></notice_period>
      <willing_to_relocate></willing_to_relocate>
      <expected_salary></expected_salary>
      <role_question_1></role_question_1>
      <resume></resume>
    </data>
  </xf:instance>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/job_title" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/full_name" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/email" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/phone" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/current_location" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/total_experience" type="xsd:string" required="true()" constraint=". >= 0 and . <= 50"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/current_role_summary" type="xsd:string" constraint="string-length(.) >= 50 and string-length(.) <= 500"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/primary_skills" type="xsd:string" required="true()"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/notice_period" type="xsd:string"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/willing_to_relocate" type="xsd:boolean"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/expected_salary" type="xsd:string"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/role_question_1" type="xsd:string" constraint="string-length(.) >= 50 and string-length(.) <= 800"/>
  <xf:bind nodeset="/data/resume" type="xsd:string"/>
</xf:model>
<xf:group>
  <xf:label>Employee Job Application Form</xf:label>
    <xf:input ref="/data/job_title">
      <xf:label>Selected Job Title</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:input ref="/data/full_name">
      <xf:label>Full Name</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:input ref="/data/email">
      <xf:label>Email Address</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:input ref="/data/phone">
      <xf:label>Phone Number</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:input ref="/data/current_location">
      <xf:label>Current Location</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:input ref="/data/total_experience">
      <xf:label>Total Years of Professional Experience</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:textarea ref="/data/current_role_summary">
      <xf:label>Current Role / Key Responsibilities (Brief)</xf:label>
    </xf:textarea>
    <xf:select ref="/data/primary_skills">
      <xf:label>Primary Skills Relevant to This Role</xf:label>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>Python</xf:label>
        <xf:value>python</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>Java</xf:label>
        <xf:value>java</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>JavaScript</xf:label>
        <xf:value>javascript</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>React</xf:label>
        <xf:value>react</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>SQL</xf:label>
        <xf:value>sql</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
    </xf:select>
    <xf:select1 ref="/data/notice_period">
      <xf:label>Notice Period</xf:label>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>Immediate</xf:label>
        <xf:value>immediate</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>15 Days</xf:label>
        <xf:value>15_days</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>30 Days</xf:label>
        <xf:value>30_days</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>60 Days</xf:label>
        <xf:value>60_days</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
    </xf:select1>
    <xf:select1 ref="/data/willing_to_relocate" appearance="full">
      <xf:label>Willing to Relocate?</xf:label>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>Yes</xf:label>
        <xf:value>True</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
      <xf:item>
        <xf:label>No</xf:label>
        <xf:value>False</xf:value>
      </xf:item>
    </xf:select1>
    <xf:input ref="/data/expected_salary">
      <xf:label>Expected Salary</xf:label>
    </xf:input>
    <xf:textarea ref="/data/role_question_1">
      <xf:label>What interests you most about this role?</xf:label>
    </xf:textarea>
    <xf:upload ref="/data/resume">
      <xf:label>Upload Resume</xf:label>
    </xf:upload>
</xf:group>

beckn:orderedItem.opun:responsibilities: Perform duties as Accountant with inclusive workplace support
